title: Comfort songs
mood: For soft evenings and feelings that need somewhere to land.
note: Press play when words feel too effortful. Let someone else hold the sentence for a while.

title: Late night study
mood: Low light, open notebook, the world turned down.
note: A playlist for the hour when silence becomes company.

title: Anxious days
mood: Gentle songs for when the nervous system needs a handrail.
note: No fixing. Just a softer room around the feeling.

title: Deep focus
mood: For clean revision blocks and less mental noise.
note: Start small. Stay with one thing. The page will warm up.
